message.content: What’s the most important concept in my app that I might not fully understand?

    97→
    98→sealed class Screen(val route: String, val label: String, val icon: ImageVector) {
    99→    object Home : Screen("home", "Home", Icons.Default.Home)
   100→    object Classes : Screen("classes", "Classes", Icons.Default.DateRange)
   101→    object Bus : Screen("bus", "Bus", Icons.Default.LocationOn)
   102→    object Weather : Screen("weather", "Weather", Icons.Default.Cloud)
   103→    object AddEdit : Screen("add_edit", "Add/Edit", Icons.Default.Add)
   104→    object Notifications : Screen("notifications", "Reminders", Icons.Default.Notifications)
   105→    object Agent : Screen("agent", "AI", Icons.Default.AutoAwesome)
   106→    object CourseDetail : Screen("course_detail/{entryId}", "", Icons.Default.DateRange) {
   107→        fun routeFor(entryId: String) = "course_detail/$entryId"
   108→    }
   109→    object EditEntry : Screen("edit_entry/{entryId}", "", Icons.Default.Add) {
   110→        fun routeFor(entryId: String) = "edit_entry/$entryId"
   111→    }
   112→}
   113→
   114→val bottomNavItems = listOf(
   115→    Screen.Home,
   116→    Screen.Classes,
   117→    Screen.Bus,
   118→    Screen.AddEdit,
   119→    Screen.Weather,
   120→    Screen.Notifications,
   121→    Screen.Agent
   122→)
   123→
   124→class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
   125→    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
   126→        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
   127→
   128→        // Create notification channels up front so reminders work even before
   129→        // the user has added any entries (e.g. after a reinstall or first launch).
   130→        HomeReminderReceiver.ensureChannel(this)
   131→        BusScheduleViewModel.ensureNotificationChannel(this)
   132→
   133→        // On Android 13+ notifications are a runtime permission.
   134→        // Request it now so class and bus reminders can actually appear.
   135→        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.TIRAMISU &&
   136→            ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(this, Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS)
   137→                != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
   138→        ) {
   139→            ActivityCompat.requestPermissions(
   140→                this,
   141→                arrayOf(Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS),
   142→                0
   143→            )
   144→        }
   145→
   146→        enableEdgeToEdge()
   147→        setContent {
   148→            Combined_scheduleTheme {
   149→                AppNavigation()
   150→            }
   151→        }
   152→    }
   153→}
   154→
   155→@OptIn(ExperimentalMaterial3Api::class)
   156→@Composable
   157→fun AppNavigation() {
   158→    val navController = rememberNavController()
   159→    val navBackStackEntry by navController.currentBackStackEntryAsState()
   160→    val currentDestination = navBackStackEntry?.destination
   161→    val isDetailScreen = currentDestination?.route?.startsWith("course_detail") == true
   162→        || currentDestination?.route?.startsWith("edit_entry") == true
   163→
   164→    val context = LocalContext.current
   165→    val searchVm: SearchViewModel = viewModel(
   166→        factory = SearchViewModel.Factory(context.applicationContext as android.app.Application)
   167→    )
   168→    val query by searchVm.query.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()
   169→    val isSearching by searchVm.isSearching.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()
   170→    val searchResults by searchVm.results.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()
   171→    val agentState by searchVm.agentState.collectAsStateWithLifecycle()
   172→
   173→    BackHandler(enabled = isSearching) { searchVm.closeSearch() }
   174→
   175→    Scaffold(
   176→        topBar = {
   177→            if (!isDetailScreen) {
   178→                TopAppBar(
   179→                    title = {
   180→                        if (isSearching) {
   181→                            SearchField(
   182→                                query = query,
   183→                                onQueryChange = searchVm::onQueryChange
   184→                            )
   185→                        } else {
   186→                            Text(
   187→                                "CombinedSchedule",
   188→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   189→                                fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold
   190→                            )
   191→                        }
   192→                    },
   193→                    navigationIcon = {
   194→                        if (isSearching) {
   195→                            IconButton(onClick = searchVm::closeSearch) {
   196→                                Icon(Icons.Default.ArrowBack, contentDescription = "Close search")
   197→                            }
   198→                        }
   199→                    },
   200→                    actions = {
   201→                        if (isSearching) {
   202→                            if (query.isNotEmpty()) {
   203→                                IconButton(onClick = { searchVm.onQueryChange("") }) {
   204→                                    Icon(Icons.Default.Clear, contentDescription = "Clear")
   205→                                }
   206→                            }
   207→                        } else {
   208→                            IconButton(onClick = searchVm::openSearch) {
   209→                                Icon(Icons.Default.Search, contentDescription = "Search")
   210→                            }
   211→                        }
   212→                    },
   213→                    colors = TopAppBarDefaults.topAppBarColors(
   214→                        containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
   215→                    )
   216→                )
   217→            }
   218→        },
   219→        bottomBar = {
   220→            if (!isDetailScreen) NavigationBar {
   221→                bottomNavItems.forEach { screen ->
   222→                    NavigationBarItem(
   223→                        icon = { Icon(screen.icon, contentDescription = screen.label) },
   224→                        label = { Text(screen.label) },
   225→                        selected = currentDestination?.hierarchy?.any { it.route == screen.route } == true,
   226→                        onClick = {
   227→                            searchVm.closeSearch()
   228→                            navController.navigate(screen.route) {
   229→                                popUpTo(navController.graph.findStartDestination().id) {
   230→                                    saveState = true
   231→                                }
   232→                                launchSingleTop = true
   233→                                restoreState = true
   234→                            }
   235→                        }
   236→                    )
   237→                }
   238→            }
   239→        }
   240→    ) { innerPadding ->
   241→        Box(modifier = Modifier.padding(innerPadding)) {
   242→            NavHost(
   243→                navController = navController,
   244→                startDestination = Screen.Home.route
   245→            ) {
   246→                composable(Screen.Home.route) {
   247→                    HomeScreen(
   248→                        onNavigateToAddEdit = {
   249→                            navController.navigate(Screen.AddEdit.route) {
   250→                                launchSingleTop = true
   251→                            }
   252→                        },
   253→                        onNavigateToNotifications = {
   254→                            navController.navigate(Screen.Notifications.route) {
   255→                                launchSingleTop = true
   256→                            }
   257→                        },
   258→                        onCourseClick = { entry ->
   259→                            navController.navigate(Screen.CourseDetail.routeFor(entry.id))
   260→                        },
   261→                        onEditEntry = { entryId ->
   262→                            navController.navigate(Screen.EditEntry.routeFor(entryId))
   263→                        }
   264→                    )
   265→                }
   266→                composable(Screen.Classes.route) { ClassScheduleScreen() }
   267→                composable(Screen.Bus.route) { BusScheduleScreen() }
   268→                composable(Screen.Weather.route) { WeatherScreen() }
   269→                composable(Screen.AddEdit.route) { AddEditEntryScreen(onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }) }
   270→                composable(Screen.Notifications.route) { NotificationSettingsScreen() }
   271→                composable(Screen.Agent.route) { AgentScreen() }
   272→                composable(
   273→                    route = Screen.CourseDetail.route,
   274→                    arguments = listOf(navArgument("entryId") { type = NavType.StringType })
   275→                ) { backStackEntry ->
   276→                    val entryId = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("entryId") ?: return@composable
   277→                    CourseDetailScreen(
   278→                        entryId = entryId,
   279→                        onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
   280→                    )
   281→                }
   282→                composable(
   283→                    route = Screen.EditEntry.route,
   284→                    arguments = listOf(navArgument("entryId") { type = NavType.StringType })
   285→                ) { backStackEntry ->
   286→                    val entryId = backStackEntry.arguments?.getString("entryId") ?: return@composable
   287→                    AddEditEntryScreen(
   288→                        entryId = entryId,
   289→                        onBack = { navController.popBackStack() }
   290→                    )
   291→                }
   292→            }
   293→
   294→            // Search results overlay
   295→            if (isSearching) {
   296→                SearchResultsOverlay(
   297→                    query = query,
   298→                    results = searchResults,
   299→                    agentState = agentState,
   300→                    onAskAgent = searchVm::askAgent,
   301→                    onEntryClick = { entry ->
   302→                        searchVm.closeSearch()
   303→                        navController.navigate(Screen.CourseDetail.routeFor(entry.id))
   304→                    },
   305→                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()
   306→                )
   307→            }
   308→        }
   309→    }
   310→}
   311→
   312→@Composable
   313→private fun SearchField(query: String, onQueryChange: (String) -> Unit) {
   314→    val focusRequester = remember { FocusRequester() }
   315→    LaunchedEffect(Unit) { focusRequester.requestFocus() }
   316→
   317→    TextField(
   318→        value = query,
   319→        onValueChange = onQueryChange,
   320→        placeholder = { Text("Search schedule and assignments…") },
   321→        singleLine = true,
   322→        modifier = Modifier
   323→            .fillMaxWidth()
   324→            .focusRequester(focusRequester),
   325→        colors = TextFieldDefaults.colors(
   326→            focusedContainerColor = Color.Transparent,
   327→            unfocusedContainerColor = Color.Transparent,
   328→            focusedIndicatorColor = Color.Transparent,
   329→            unfocusedIndicatorColor = Color.Transparent
   330→        )
   331→    )
   332→}
   333→
   334→@Composable
   335→private fun SearchResultsOverlay(
   336→    query: String,
   337→    results: List<SearchResult>,
   338→    agentState: AgentState,
   339→    onAskAgent: () -> Unit,
   340→    onEntryClick: (HomeEntry) -> Unit,
   341→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
   342→) {
   343→    Surface(
   344→        modifier = modifier,
   345→        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.background
   346→    ) {
   347→        if (query.isBlank()) {
   348→            Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(), contentAlignment = Alignment.Center) {
   349→                Text(
   350→                    "Type to search…",
   351→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   352→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   353→                )
   354→            }
   355→        } else {
   356→            LazyColumn {
   357→                // ── AI Agent card ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   358→                item {
   359→                    AgentCard(
   360→                        agentState = agentState,
   361→                        onAskAgent = onAskAgent,
   362→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp)
   363→                    )
   364→                    HorizontalDivider(color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outlineVariant)
   365→                }
   366→
   367→                // ── Local results ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   368→                if (results.isEmpty()) {
   369→                    item {
   370→                        Box(
   371→                            modifier = Modifier
   372→                                .fillMaxWidth()
   373→                                .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 20.dp),
   374→                            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   375→                        ) {
   376→                            Text(
   377→                                "No schedule or assignment matches for \"$query\"",
   378→                                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   379→                                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   380→                            )
   381→                        }
   382→                    }
   383→                } else {
   384→                    items(results) { result ->
   385→                        when (result) {
   386→                            is SearchResult.EntryResult ->
   387→                                EntrySearchItem(result.entry, onClick = { onEntryClick(result.entry) })
   388→                            is SearchResult.WorkResult ->
   389→                                WorkSearchItem(result.work)
   390→                        }
   391→                        HorizontalDivider(color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.outlineVariant)
   392→                    }
   393→                }
   394→            }
   395→        }
   396→    }
   397→}
   398→
   399→@Composable
   400→private fun AgentCard(
   401→    agentState: AgentState,
   402→    onAskAgent: () -> Unit,
   403→    modifier: Modifier = Modifier
   404→) {
   405→    Card(
   406→        modifier = modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   407→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   408→            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondaryContainer
   409→        )
   410→    ) {
   411→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(16.dp)) {
   412→            Row(
   413→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   414→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   415→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   416→            ) {
   417→                Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   418→                    Icon(
   419→                        imageVector = Icons.Default.AutoAwesome,
   420→                        contentDescription = null,
   421→                        tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSecondaryContainer,
   422→                        modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp)
   423→                    )
   424→                    Spacer(Modifier.width(8.dp))
   425→                    Text(
   426→                        "AI Assistant",
   427→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelLarge,
   428→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   429→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSecondaryContainer
   430→                    )
   431→                }
   432→                when (agentState) {
   433→                    is AgentState.Idle -> {
   434→                        Button(
   435→                            onClick = onAskAgent,
   436→                            colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   437→                                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary
   438→                            )
   439→                        ) {
   440→                            Text("Ask", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium)
   441→                        }
   442→                    }
   443→                    is AgentState.Loading -> {
   444→                        CircularProgressIndicator(
   445→                            modifier = Modifier.size(24.dp),
   446→                            strokeWidth = 2.dp,
   447→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSecondaryContainer
   448→                        )
   449→                    }
   450→                    is AgentState.Answer -> {
   451→                        Button(
   452→                            onClick = onAskAgent,
   453→                            colors = ButtonDefaults.buttonColors(
   454→                                containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary
   455→                            )
   456→                        ) {
   457→                            Text("Ask again", style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium)
   458→                        }
   459→                    }
   460→                }
   461→            }
   462→
   463→            if (agentState is AgentState.Answer) {
   464→                Spacer(Modifier.height(10.dp))
   465→                Text(
   466→                    text = agentState.text,
   467→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   468→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSecondaryContainer
   469→                )
   470→            }
   471→        }
   472→    }
   473→}
   474→
   475→@Composable
   476→private fun EntrySearchItem(entry: HomeEntry, onClick: () -> Unit) {
   477→    Row(
   478→        modifier = Modifier
   479→            .fillMaxWidth()
   480→            .clickable(onClick = onClick)
   481→            .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
   482→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   483→    ) {
   484→        Text(
   485→            text = if (entry.isBus) "🚌" else "📚",
   486→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   487→            modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp)
   488→        )
   489→        Spacer(Modifier.width(12.dp))
   490→        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   491→            Text(
   492→                text = entry.title,
   493→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   494→                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   495→                maxLines = 1,
   496→                overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   497→            )
   498→            val sub = buildList {
   499→                if (entry.location.isNotEmpty()) add(entry.location)
   500→                add(entry.daysOfWeek.joinToString(", "))
   501→            }.joinToString(" · ")
   502→            Text(
   503→                text = sub,
   504→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   505→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   506→            )
   507→        }
   508→        Text(
   509→            text = "Schedule",
   510→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   511→            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   512→        )
   513→    }
   514→}
   515→
   516→@Composable
   517→private fun WorkSearchItem(work: Work) {
   518→    Row(
   519→        modifier = Modifier
   520→            .fillMaxWidth()
   521→            .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
   522→        verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   523→    ) {
   524→        Text(
   525→            text = "📝",
   526→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   527→            modifier = Modifier.size(32.dp)
   528→        )
   529→        Spacer(Modifier.width(12.dp))
   530→        Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   531→            Text(
   532→                text = work.title,
   533→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   534→                fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   535→                maxLines = 1,
   536→                overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
   537→            )
   538→            Text(
   539→                text = work.courseTitle + if (work.dueDate.isNotEmpty()) " · Due ${work.dueDate}" else "",
   540→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   541→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   542→            )
   543→        }
   544→        Text(
   545→            text = if (work.isCompleted) "Done" else "Assignment",
   546→            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   547→            color = if (work.isCompleted)
   548→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   549→            else
   550→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.secondary
   551→        )
   552→    }
   553→}
   554→

1→package com.example.combined_schedule.ui.screens
     2→

     8→import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
     9→import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.*
    10→import androidx.compose.material3.*
    11→import androidx.compose.runtime.*
    12→import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
    13→import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
    14→import androidx.compose.ui.draw.alpha
    15→import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalContext
    16→import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
    17→import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
    18→import androidx.lifecycle.viewmodel.compose.viewModel
    19→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.HomeEntry
    20→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.Work
    21→import com.example.combined_schedule.data.WorkRepository
    22→import com.example.combined_schedule.ui.viewmodel.HomeEntryViewModel
    23→import com.example.combined_schedule.util.DateUtils
    24→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
    25→import java.time.Duration
    26→import java.time.LocalDate
    27→import java.time.LocalTime
    28→import java.time.format.DateTimeFormatter
    29→import java.time.format.TextStyle
    30→import java.util.Locale
    31→
    32→@Composable
    33→fun HomeScreen(
    34→    onNavigateToAddEdit: () -> Unit = {},
    35→    onNavigateToNotifications: () -> Unit = {},
    36→    onCourseClick: (HomeEntry) -> Unit = {},
    37→    onEditEntry: (String) -> Unit = {}
    38→) {
    39→    val context = LocalContext.current
    40→    val vm: HomeEntryViewModel = viewModel(factory = HomeEntryViewModel.Factory(context))
    41→    val allEntries by vm.entries.collectAsState()
    42→
    43→    val workRepo = remember { WorkRepository.getInstance(context) }
    44→    val allWorks by workRepo.getAll().collectAsState()
    45→
    46→    val today = LocalDate.now()
    47→    val dateFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("EEEE, MMMM d", java.util.Locale.ENGLISH)
    48→    val formattedDate = today.format(dateFormatter)
    49→    val todayShort = today.dayOfWeek.getDisplayName(TextStyle.SHORT, Locale.ENGLISH)
    50→
    51→    // Live clock — refreshes every 30 seconds
    52→    var currentTime by remember { mutableStateOf(LocalTime.now()) }
    53→    LaunchedEffect(Unit) {
    54→        while (true) {
    55→            delay(30_000L)
    56→            currentTime = LocalTime.now()
    57→        }
    58→    }
    59→
    60→    // Filter to today's entries, sorted by time
    61→    val todayEntries = remember(allEntries, todayShort) {
    62→        allEntries
    63→            .filter { todayShort in it.daysOfWeek }
    64→            .sortedBy { it.time }
    65→    }
    66→
    67→    val pastEntries = todayEntries.filter { entryTime(it).isBefore(currentTime) }
    68→    val upcomingEntries = todayEntries.filter { !entryTime(it).isBefore(currentTime) }
    69→    val nextEntry = upcomingEntries.firstOrNull()
    70→
    71→    var bannerDismissed by remember { mutableStateOf(false) }
    72→    // Reset dismiss when a new event becomes "next" so the banner reappears
    73→    LaunchedEffect(nextEntry?.title) { bannerDismissed = false }
    74→
    75→    // Incomplete Work items due today or overdue, sorted with today's first
    76→    val dueWorks = remember(allWorks, today) {
    77→        allWorks
    78→            .filter { !it.isCompleted && DateUtils.isDueOrOverdue(it.dueDate, today) }
    79→            .sortedBy { it.dueDate }
    80→    }
    81→
    82→    Box(modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize()) {
    83→        LazyColumn(
    84→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxSize(),
    85→            contentPadding = PaddingValues(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 16.dp),
    86→        ) {
    87→            // ── Header ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    88→            item {
    89→                Text(
    90→                    text = formattedDate,
    91→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineSmall,
    92→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
    93→                )
    94→                Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
    95→                val statusLine = when (upcomingEntries.size) {
    96→                    0 -> "No more events today"
    97→                    1 -> "1 event remaining today"
    98→                    else -> "${upcomingEntries.size} events remaining today"
    99→                }
   100→                Text(
   101→                    text = statusLine,
   102→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   103→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   104→                )
   105→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
   106→            }
   107→
   108→            // ── Next Event Banner ─────────────────────────────────────────────
   109→            item {
   110→                if (nextEntry != null && !bannerDismissed) {
   111→                    NextEventBanner(
   112→                        entry = nextEntry,
   113→                        currentTime = currentTime,
   114→                        onDismiss = { bannerDismissed = true }
   115→                    )
   116→                } else if (nextEntry == null) {
   117→                    NoMoreEventsCard()
   118→                }
   119→                Spacer(Modifier.height(20.dp))
   120→            }
   121→
   122→            // ── Today's upcoming entries ──────────────────────────────────────
   123→            item {
   124→                Text(
   125→                    text = "Today's Schedule",
   126→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   127→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   128→                )
   129→                Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   130→            }
   131→
   132→            if (upcomingEntries.isEmpty() && pastEntries.isEmpty()) {
   133→                item {
   134→                    Text(
   135→                        text = "Nothing scheduled for today — tap + to add an entry.",
   136→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   137→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   138→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   139→                    )
   140→                }
   141→            } else if (upcomingEntries.isEmpty()) {
   142→                item {
   143→                    Text(
   144→                        text = "All done for today!",
   145→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   146→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant,
   147→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(vertical = 4.dp)
   148→                    )
   149→                }
   150→            } else {
   151→                items(upcomingEntries, key = { it.id }) { entry ->
   152→                    EntryListItem(
   153→                        entry = entry,
   154→                        isPast = false,
   155→                        onClick = { if (!entry.isBus) onCourseClick(entry) },
   156→                        onEdit = { onEditEntry(entry.id) }
   157→                    )
   158→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   159→                }
   160→            }
   161→
   162→            // ── Past entries (greyed out) ─────────────────────────────────────
   163→            if (pastEntries.isNotEmpty()) {
   164→                item {
   165→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   166→                    Text(
   167→                        text = "Earlier today",
   168→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   169→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   170→                    )
   171→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   172→                }
   173→                items(pastEntries, key = { "past_${it.id}" }) { entry ->
   174→                    EntryListItem(
   175→                        entry = entry,
   176→                        isPast = true,
   177→                        onClick = { if (!entry.isBus) onCourseClick(entry) },
   178→                        onEdit = { onEditEntry(entry.id) }
   179→                    )
   180→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   181→                }
   182→            }
   183→
   184→            // ── Due Today / Overdue assignments ───────────────────────────────
   185→            if (dueWorks.isNotEmpty()) {
   186→                item {
   187→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(4.dp))
   188→                    Text(
   189→                        text = "Due Today",
   190→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   191→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   192→                    )
   193→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   194→                }
   195→                items(dueWorks, key = { "due_${it.id}" }) { work ->
   196→                    DueWorkItem(work = work, today = today)
   197→                    Spacer(Modifier.height(8.dp))
   198→                }
   199→            }
   200→
   201→            item { Spacer(Modifier.height(72.dp)) }
   202→        }
   203→
   204→        FloatingActionButton(
   205→            onClick = onNavigateToAddEdit,
   206→            containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary,
   207→            modifier = Modifier
   208→                .align(Alignment.BottomEnd)
   209→                .padding(16.dp)
   210→        ) {
   211→            Icon(Icons.Default.Add, contentDescription = "Add entry")
   212→        }
   213→    }
   214→}
   215→
   216→@Composable
   217→private fun DueWorkItem(work: Work, today: LocalDate) {
   218→    val workDate = DateUtils.parseIsoDate(work.dueDate)
   219→    val isOverdue = workDate != null && workDate.isBefore(today)
   220→
   221→    Card(
   222→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   223→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
   224→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   225→            containerColor = if (isOverdue)
   226→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.errorContainer.copy(alpha = 0.5f)
   227→            else
   228→                MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
   229→        ),
   230→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = if (isOverdue) 0.dp else 2.dp)
   231→    ) {
   232→        Row(
   233→            modifier = Modifier
   234→                .fillMaxWidth()
   235→                .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
   236→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   237→        ) {
   238→            Text("📝", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge)
   239→            Spacer(Modifier.width(12.dp))
   240→            Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   241→                Text(
   242→                    text = work.title,
   243→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   244→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   245→                )
   246→                Text(
   247→                    text = work.courseTitle,
   248→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   249→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   250→                )
   251→            }
   252→            if (isOverdue) {
   253→                Surface(
   254→                    shape = RoundedCornerShape(6.dp),
   255→                    color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   256→                ) {
   257→                    Text(
   258→                        "OVERDUE",
   259→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   260→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onError,
   261→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   262→                        modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 6.dp, vertical = 2.dp)
   263→                    )
   264→                }
   265→            }
   266→        }
   267→    }
   268→}
   269→
   270→private fun entryTime(entry: HomeEntry): LocalTime {
   271→    val parts = entry.time.split(":")
   272→    val h = parts.getOrNull(0)?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
   273→    val m = parts.getOrNull(1)?.toIntOrNull() ?: 0
   274→    return LocalTime.of(h, m)
   275→}
   276→
   277→// ─── Banner logic helpers (internal so unit tests can call them) ──────────────
   278→
   279→internal fun bannerIsUrgent(minutesUntil: Long): Boolean = minutesUntil in 0..30
   280→
   281→internal fun bannerCountdownText(minutesUntil: Long): String = when {
   282→    minutesUntil <= 0 -> "Starting now"
   283→    minutesUntil < 60 -> "in $minutesUntil min"
   284→    else -> {
   285→        val h = minutesUntil / 60
   286→        val m = minutesUntil % 60
   287→        if (m == 0L) "in ${h}h" else "in ${h}h ${m}m"
   288→    }
   289→}
   290→
   291→// ─── Next Event Banner ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   292→
   293→@Composable
   294→private fun NextEventBanner(entry: HomeEntry, currentTime: LocalTime, onDismiss: () -> Unit) {
   295→    val timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a", java.util.Locale.ENGLISH)
   296→    val entryLocalTime = entryTime(entry)
   297→    val minutesUntil = Duration.between(currentTime, entryLocalTime).toMinutes()
   298→    val isUrgent = bannerIsUrgent(minutesUntil)
   299→    val countdownText = bannerCountdownText(minutesUntil)
   300→
   301→    val containerColor = if (isUrgent)
   302→        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.errorContainer
   303→    else
   304→        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primaryContainer
   305→    val onContainerColor = if (isUrgent)
   306→        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onErrorContainer
   307→    else
   308→        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimaryContainer
   309→    val pillColor = if (isUrgent)
   310→        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.error
   311→    else
   312→        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary
   313→    val onPillColor = if (isUrgent)
   314→        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onError
   315→    else
   316→        MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onPrimary
   317→    val headerLabel = if (isUrgent) "STARTING SOON" else "UP NEXT"
   318→
   319→    Card(
   320→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   321→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   322→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = containerColor),
   323→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = 6.dp)
   324→    ) {
   325→        Column(modifier = Modifier.padding(20.dp)) {
   326→            Row(
   327→                modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   328→                horizontalArrangement = Arrangement.SpaceBetween,
   329→                verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   330→            ) {
   331→                Text(
   332→                    text = headerLabel,
   333→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelSmall,
   334→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   335→                    color = onContainerColor.copy(alpha = 0.65f)
   336→                )
   337→                Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   338→                    Surface(shape = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp), color = pillColor) {
   339→                        Text(
   340→                            text = countdownText,
   341→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.labelMedium,
   342→                            fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold,
   343→                            color = onPillColor,
   344→                            modifier = Modifier.padding(horizontal = 12.dp, vertical = 5.dp)
   345→                        )
   346→                    }
   347→                    Spacer(Modifier.width(4.dp))
   348→                    IconButton(onClick = onDismiss, modifier = Modifier.size(28.dp)) {
   349→                        Icon(
   350→                            imageVector = Icons.Default.Close,
   351→                            contentDescription = "Dismiss",
   352→                            tint = onContainerColor.copy(alpha = 0.55f),
   353→                            modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   354→                        )
   355→                    }
   356→                }
   357→            }
   358→
   359→            Spacer(Modifier.height(14.dp))
   360→
   361→            Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   362→                Text(text = if (entry.isBus) "🚌" else "📚", style = MaterialTheme.typography.headlineMedium)
   363→                Spacer(Modifier.width(14.dp))
   364→                Column {
   365→                    Text(
   366→                        text = entry.title,
   367→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge,
   368→                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
   369→                        color = onContainerColor
   370→                    )
   371→                    Text(
   372→                        text = entryLocalTime.format(timeFormatter),
   373→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   374→                        color = onContainerColor.copy(alpha = 0.8f)
   375→                    )
   376→                }
   377→            }
   378→
   379→            if (entry.location.isNotEmpty()) {
   380→                Spacer(Modifier.height(10.dp))
   381→                Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   382→                    Icon(
   383→                        imageVector = Icons.Default.LocationOn,
   384→                        contentDescription = null,
   385→                        tint = onContainerColor.copy(alpha = 0.65f),
   386→                        modifier = Modifier.size(16.dp)
   387→                    )
   388→                    Spacer(Modifier.width(4.dp))
   389→                    Text(
   390→                        text = entry.location,
   391→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyMedium,
   392→                        color = onContainerColor.copy(alpha = 0.65f)
   393→                    )
   394→                }
   395→            }
   396→        }
   397→    }
   398→}
   399→
   400→// ─── No More Events ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   401→
   402→@Composable
   403→private fun NoMoreEventsCard() {
   404→    Card(
   405→        modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth(),
   406→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(20.dp),
   407→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(containerColor = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant)
   408→    ) {
   409→        Box(
   410→            modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth().padding(28.dp),
   411→            contentAlignment = Alignment.Center
   412→        ) {
   413→            Text(
   414→                text = "No more events today 🎉",
   415→                style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleMedium,
   416→                color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   417→            )
   418→        }
   419→    }
   420→}
   421→
   422→// ─── Entry List Item ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   423→
   424→@Composable
   425→private fun EntryListItem(
   426→    entry: HomeEntry,
   427→    isPast: Boolean,
   428→    onClick: () -> Unit = {},
   429→    onEdit: () -> Unit = {}
   430→) {
   431→    val timeFormatter = DateTimeFormatter.ofPattern("h:mm a", java.util.Locale.ENGLISH)
   432→
   433→    Card(
   434→        modifier = Modifier
   435→            .fillMaxWidth()
   436→            .alpha(if (isPast) 0.45f else 1f)
   437→            .then(if (!entry.isBus) Modifier.clickable(onClick = onClick) else Modifier),
   438→        shape = RoundedCornerShape(12.dp),
   439→        colors = CardDefaults.cardColors(
   440→            containerColor = if (isPast) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surfaceVariant else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.surface
   441→        ),
   442→        elevation = CardDefaults.cardElevation(defaultElevation = if (isPast) 0.dp else 2.dp)
   443→    ) {
   444→        Row(
   445→            modifier = Modifier
   446→                .fillMaxWidth()
   447→                .padding(horizontal = 16.dp, vertical = 12.dp),
   448→            verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically
   449→        ) {
   450→            Text(text = if (entry.isBus) "🚌" else "📚", style = MaterialTheme.typography.titleLarge)
   451→            Spacer(Modifier.width(12.dp))
   452→            Column(modifier = Modifier.weight(1f)) {
   453→                Text(
   454→                    text = entry.title,
   455→                    style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodyLarge,
   456→                    fontWeight = FontWeight.SemiBold
   457→                )
   458→                Row(verticalAlignment = Alignment.CenterVertically) {
   459→                    Text(
   460→                        text = entryTime(entry).format(timeFormatter),
   461→                        style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   462→                        color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   463→                    )
   464→                    if (entry.location.isNotEmpty()) {
   465→                        Text(
   466→                            text = " · ${entry.location}",
   467→                            style = MaterialTheme.typography.bodySmall,
   468→                            color = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant
   469→                        )
   470→                    }
   471→                }
   472→            }
   473→            IconButton(onClick = onEdit, modifier = Modifier.size(36.dp)) {
   474→                Icon(
   475→                    imageVector = Icons.Default.Edit,
   476→                    contentDescription = "Edit entry",
   477→                    tint = MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.5f),
   478→                    modifier = Modifier.size(18.dp)
   479→                )
   480→            }
   481→            Icon(
   482→                imageVector = if (entry.reminderEnabled) Icons.Default.Notifications else Icons.Default.NotificationsOff,
   483→                contentDescription = if (entry.reminderEnabled) "Reminder on" else "Reminder off",
   484→                tint = if (entry.reminderEnabled) MaterialTheme.colorScheme.primary else MaterialTheme.colorScheme.onSurfaceVariant.copy(alpha = 0.35f),
   485→                modifier = Modifier.size(20.dp)
   486→            )
   487→        }
   488→    }
   489→}
   490→

<system-reminder>

But you MUST refuse to improve or augment the code. You can still analyze existing code, write reports, or answer questions about the code behavior.
</system-reminder>

content: Based on what my app does, which CS idea is the most important one I should really understand before this class ends?
If I had to explain one idea from my app in an interview—not the code, just the idea—what should it be?

content.text:
The single most important concept in your app — and the one most likely to be a black box — is **ViewModel + StateFlow + `collectAsState()`**: the reactive data flow pattern that connects your data to your UI.

Here's what's happening at a high level, using `HomeScreen` as the example:

```kotlin
val vm: HomeEntryViewModel = viewModel(...)   // 1. Get the ViewModel
val allEntries by vm.entries.collectAsState() // 2. Subscribe to its data
```

**Three things are interacting here:**

**1. ViewModel** — lives independently of the screen. When you rotate your phone or navigate away and back, the ViewModel survives while the Composable is destroyed and recreated. It's the reason your data doesn't disappear on rotation.

**2. StateFlow** — a stream of values. The ViewModel holds a `StateFlow<List<HomeEntry>>`. Whenever a new entry is saved, it emits the updated list. Nothing in the UI has to ask "did anything change?" — it just gets notified.

**3. `collectAsState()`** — bridges the Kotlin `StateFlow` world into Compose's world. When the flow emits a new value, Compose automatically **recomposes** (re-runs) any Composable that read it. That's why adding a schedule entry makes it appear on screen instantly — you never wrote "refresh the list."

**The key insight:** you never manually update UI. Instead:
- User action → ViewModel saves data → StateFlow emits → Compose re-renders automatically.

This is fundamentally different from traditional Android where you'd call `adapter.notifyDataSetChanged()` or `textView.setText(...)` yourself.

If you want to trace it end-to-end, the next step would be to look at `HomeEntryViewModel.kt` to see how the `StateFlow` is backed by a Room database. Want me to walk through that?

data.command: PROJECT_KEY=$(pwd | sed 's|[ /_]|-|g'); SESSION_DIR="$HOME/.claude/projects/$PROJECT_KEY"; DEST="$(pwd)/.claude-sessions"; mkdir -p "$DEST"; for f in "$SESSION_DIR"/*.jsonl; do [ -f "$f" ] && cp "$f" "$DEST/" 2>/dev/null; done

hookInfos.command: PROJECT_KEY=$(pwd | sed 's|[ /_]|-|g'); SESSION_DIR="$HOME/.claude/projects/$PROJECT_KEY"; DEST="$(pwd)/.claude-sessions"; mkdir -p "$DEST"; for f in "$SESSION_DIR"/*.jsonl; do [ -f "$f" ] && cp "$f" "$DEST/" 2>/dev/null; done

message.content: Based on what my app does, which CS idea is the most important one I should really understand before this class ends?
If I had to explain one idea from my app in an interview—not the code, just the idea—what should it be?

content.text:
**The Observer Pattern.**

Here's the one-sentence version: *Instead of repeatedly asking "did anything change?", you register interest once, and get notified automatically when it does.*

Your entire app runs on this idea:

- The **schedule list** doesn't poll the database every second. It subscribes, and the UI updates the moment you save a new entry.
- The **search bar** doesn't check the query on a timer. The results composable observes the query, and re-renders when it changes.
- The **notifications** are the same idea at the OS level — you don't check whether it's time for class; the system notifies your receiver when the alarm fires.
- The **AI chat** shows a spinner while loading and swaps it for text when the answer arrives — that's the UI observing an `AgentState` value that transitions from `Loading` → `Answer`.

**Why this is the right thing to know for an interview:**

It's a named, classic idea (Observer pattern, also called Publish-Subscribe). It shows up in frontend frameworks, backend event queues, databases, operating systems, and distributed systems. An interviewer asking "how does React work?" or "how does Kafka work?" or "how does Android notify your app of a system event?" — the honest answer to all three is the same pattern.

The way to explain it without any code: *"Instead of the viewer constantly asking the model for updates, the model keeps a list of interested parties and pushes updates to them. The viewer just has to say 'tell me when something changes' once."*

That one idea — push over pull, subscribe over poll — is what makes your app reactive, your UI live, and your notifications timely. It's worth owning completely.
